name: tradingview-mcp
description: MCP server for TradingView — real-time quotes, screener, alerts, watchlists, news, chart layouts, Pine scripts, and account management.

volumes.name: tradingview-mcp-session
volumes.description: Persists the TradingView session cookie file across container restarts.

env.name: TV_SESSION_FILE
env.description: Path to the saved session cookie file inside the container.

setup.description: Run the login container once before starting the server to authenticate and save session cookies.

env.name: TV_USERNAME
env.description: Your TradingView username or email address.

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Get real-time price quote for one or more symbols

tools.name: get_symbol_info
tools.description: Get detailed fundamental and technical data for a symbol

tools.name: screen_stocks
tools.description: Screen US stocks with price, fundamental, and technical filters

tools.name: get_screener_fields
tools.description: List all available screener field names by category

tools.name: get_alert
tools.description: Get details of a specific alert

tools.name: get_watchlist
tools.description: Get a watchlist and its symbols

tools.name: get_news
tools.description: Get latest news headlines for a symbol

tools.name: get_layout
tools.description: Get a saved chart layout configuration

tools.name: list_scripts
tools.description: List saved Pine Script indicators and strategies

tools.name: reset_session
tools.description: Clear cached session and force re-authentication
